title: Uniface Messages 3000-3999
text: Uniface Messages 3000-3999 Refer to the Uniface message number, message text, and an explanation of the message. The following table refers to messages with numbering between 3000 - 3999 . Search: Column Message number Message text Explanation Filter results... 33 rows found Message number Message text Explanation Filter 33 rows found Filter 33 rows found Filter 33 rows found Message number Message text Explanation 3000 Top of data. You reached the beginning of a data field, using, for example, a Backspace key. This message is informative only. 3001 End of data. You reached the end of a data field. This message is informative only. 3002 No frames allowed. You tried to use the Frame Definition form on a field; this is not allowed. 3003 Function not allowed: you must unZoom first. You tried to employ a function while still in Zoom mode. ^ACCEPT or ^QUIT to leave Zoom mode and try the function again. 3004 Data modified during Zoom; do you really want to ignore? (Y/N). Any modifications you made to data during a session while in Zoom mode are ignored when you use ^QUIT to leave Zoom mode. If you want to retain modifications made during the Zoom session, you must leave Zoom mode with ^ACCEPT. 3005 Select function not active. You used a function usually employed with the select function, the remove select function for example, without selecting an element. Select an element and continue. 3006 Select function already active. The select key was pressed twice. This is unnecessary. Press RESET SELECT to leave select mode. 3007 Select function still active. The select function is active in a field, and you attempted to leave the field or pressed the help key. Press RESET SELECT to continue. 3008 Search phrase not found. This message is self-explanatory. 3009 No fonts allowed; ASCII only. This message is self-explanatory. 3010 Underline not allowed. This message is self-explanatory. 3011 Bold not allowed. This message is self-explanatory. 3012 Ruler not allowed. This message is self-explanatory. 3013 Display only; modifications not allowed. You are not allowed to modify a field intended for display purposes only (an index form, for example). 3014 Maximum data size exceeded. A maximum data size is defined for this field. Data above the maximum size permitted will not be accepted. Enter a permitted number of characters. 3015 No control characters allowed. Some fields, for example name fields, are defined to accept alphanumeric entries only. This message is displayed if, for example, you try to use a carriage return in such a field. Enter acceptable characters only. 3016 Numeric field; only {0-9 + - . ,} are allowed. Enter acceptable numerics or mathematical symbols only. 3017 Specify search phrase: Enter a search string. 3018 Specify input file name: When you use the named ^REMOVE or ^INSERT functions to transfer files, you must specify the name of the input file. Enter the input file name. 3019 Specify output file name: You must specify the destination of a named ^REMOVED file here. Enter the output file name. 3020 Total number of bytes copied: This message is informative only. 3021 Digits only. Only numbers (including integers) are allowed in this field. 3022 Italic not allowed. This message is self-explanatory. 3023 Only multinational allowed (Font 0-1). Only Font 0 and Font 1 are allowed in this field. 3024 No tabs allowed. This message is self-explanatory. 3033 Profile seen: ignore numeric and maximum size check. If you enter a wildcard profile in a field, the normal checks on the field for size and string type are ignored. 3450 One or more fields have been changed. Quit anyway? This message is self-explanatory. 3451 Full path = %%v_long_filename%%%. This message is self-explanatory. 3452 %%v_filename%%% saved (%%v_filelength%%% bytes). This message is self-explanatory. 3453 %%v_filename%%% loaded (%%v_filelength%%% bytes). This message is self-explanatory. 3454 You must specify an XML source document and an XSL transformation file. This message is self-explanatory. 3455 You must specify an XSL filename. This message is self-explanatory. 3507 License %%$$UP_MESS1%%% not available or not authorized. Check message frame for additional information. This message is self-explanatory. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
